# tachi Brand Guidelines

## Origin

**tachi** (太刀) — "great sword" in Japanese. A pre-katana sword known for its elegant curve (sori), layered construction, and ceremonial authority. The name connects to threat modeling through precise metaphors: the hamon temper line represents trust boundaries, differential hardening represents defense in depth, and the mounted cavalry perspective represents architectural overview.

## Logo System

### Primary Mark (Vertical Lockup)
The tachi blade silhouette with vermillion hamon accent, "tachi" wordmark below.

| Variant | File | Use |
|---------|------|-----|
| Light background | `final/tachi-logo-primary.png` | PDF cover pages, README, white backgrounds |
| Dark background | `final/tachi-logo-primary-dark.png` | Dark slides, social media, dark UI |

### Horizontal Lockup
Blade mark + "tachi" wordmark side-by-side.

| Variant | File | Use |
|---------|------|-----|
| Light background | `final/tachi-logo-horizontal.png` | PDF running headers, README headers, docs |
| Dark background | `final/tachi-logo-horizontal-dark.png` | Dark PDF header bars, infographic footers |

### Icon (Squircle)
Rounded square with blade and vermillion accent. Works at all sizes down to 32px.

| Variant | File | Use |
|---------|------|-----|
| Indigo on white bg | `final/tachi-icon.png` | Favicon, GitHub avatar, app icon (light mode) |
| Indigo on dark bg | `final/tachi-icon-dark.png` | App icon (dark mode), dark UI contexts |

### Selection Concepts (Provenance)
Original selected concepts retained in `concepts/` for design history:
- `concepts/sori-v3b-red-hamon-accent.png` — Original V3b selection
- `concepts/tsuba-v2a-refined-squircle.png` — Original V2a selection

## Color Palette

### Brand Colors

| Role | Name | Hex | RGB | Usage |
|------|------|-----|-----|-------|
| Primary | Tachi Indigo | `#1B2A4A` | 27, 42, 74 | Logo, headers, primary surfaces |
| Secondary | Steel Blue | `#2D4A6F` | 45, 74, 111 | Supporting elements, hover states |
| Accent | Vermillion | `#C93A40` | 201, 58, 64 | Hamon line, CTAs, emphasis, CONFIDENTIAL badges |
| Highlight | Muted Gold | `#B8963E` | 184, 150, 62 | Premium touches (use sparingly) |
| Neutral Dark | Lacquer Black | `#0D0D0D` | 13, 13, 13 | Body text, dark mode backgrounds |
| Neutral Light | Washi White | `#F5F2EB` | 245, 242, 235 | Page backgrounds, cards |
| Neutral Mid | Ash Gray | `#64748B` | 100, 116, 139 | Secondary text, captions, footers |

### Severity Colors (Functional — Do Not Change)

| Severity | Hex | Usage |
|----------|-----|-------|
| Critical | `#DC2626` | Critical findings |
| High | `#F97316` | High findings |
| Medium | `#EAB308` | Medium findings |
| Low | `#4169E1` | Low findings |

Severity colors are functional, not brand colors. They are consistent across all tachi outputs (PDF reports, infographics, SARIF) and must not be modified for brand purposes.

## Typography

### Primary (Headings)
**Helvetica Neue** > Helvetica > Arial > sans-serif fallback

### Secondary (Body)
**New Computer Modern** > Charter > Georgia > serif fallback

### Monospace (Code/Tables)
**Menlo** > Courier New > Courier > monospace fallback

### Wordmark
The "tachi" wordmark uses a modern geometric sans-serif (Inter, SF Pro, or similar) in lowercase, medium weight, with slightly wide letter-spacing.

## Usage Rules

### Do
- Use the horizontal lockup for headers and inline contexts
- Use the vertical lockup for cover pages and large display
- Use the icon for favicons, avatars, and small contexts
- Maintain the vermillion red hamon accent in all logo variants
- Use appropriate light/dark variant for the background

### Don't
- Don't modify the logo colors
- Don't rotate or skew the logo
- Don't place the light-bg logo on dark backgrounds (use the dark variant)
- Don't use the logo at sizes smaller than 32px (use the icon instead)
- Don't add effects (shadows, glows, outlines) to the logo
- Don't separate the hamon accent from the blade mark

### Minimum Clear Space
Maintain padding equal to the height of the "t" in the wordmark on all sides of the logo.

## PDF Report Integration

| Context | Asset | Placement |
|---------|-------|-----------|
| Cover page | `tachi-logo-primary.png` or `tachi-logo-primary-dark.png` | Centered, upper third |
| Running header | `tachi-logo-horizontal.png` or `tachi-logo-horizontal-dark.png` | Left-aligned, header bar |
| Footer | Text only: "Generated by tachi" in italic | Centered |
| Infographic footer | Text only | Centered |

## File Inventory

```
brand/
├── BRAND_GUIDELINES.md          # This file
├── concepts/                    # Selected originals (design provenance)
│   ├── sori-v3b-red-hamon-accent.png
│   └── tsuba-v2a-refined-squircle.png
└── final/                       # Production assets
    ├── tachi-logo-primary.png          # Vertical lockup, white bg
    ├── tachi-logo-primary-dark.png     # Vertical lockup, indigo bg
    ├── tachi-logo-horizontal.png       # Horizontal lockup, white bg
    ├── tachi-logo-horizontal-dark.png  # Horizontal lockup, indigo bg
    ├── tachi-icon.png                  # Squircle icon, white bg
    └── tachi-icon-dark.png             # Squircle icon, indigo bg
```
